flae.export.audio_only_tooltip:
Skip the video pipeline entirely and write only the lossless WAV.
No video file is produced.
Camera/listener tracking is preserved, so panning and distance attenuation match a normal export.
flae.export.wav_format_tooltip:
Sample format of the written WAV, for both normal and audio-only exports.
32-bit float is the untouched lossless data; the integer formats quantize (plain rounding, no dither).
flae.export.wav_sample_rate_tooltip:
Audio-only exports reopen the OpenAL loopback device at this rate, so the game mixes natively at it — FLAE never resamples.
Normal (video) exports always run at Flashback's native 48000 Hz.
